Why ID Hotshot

Built different. Driven harder.

We're not a faceless dispatch desk routing your load through three layers of brokers. We answer our own phone. We know our drivers. And because we run lean, we pass the savings to you — typically 10–15% under market on most lanes.

Same-day dispatch
Most loads roll within 4 hours of booking. If we say we can do it, we're already moving.
Honest pricing
No fuel-surcharge games. No surprise broker fees. Quote in, quote out — that's the price.
Woman-owned, hands-on
When you call, you get someone who's actually been behind the wheel for 20+ years. Not a call center.
Fully covered
$1M cargo, $1M auto liability, MC authority active. Certificates available on request.
Our Story

Twenty years on the road.
One year on her own terms.

Iliana Delgado grew up watching the desert roll by from the passenger seat of her dad's old Peterbilt. By twenty, she had her CDL. By twenty-five, she was running her own truck. She raised her daughter in truck stops, motel rooms, and the front cab — homework on the dashboard, dinner on the dinette.

For two decades she ran routes for other companies — moving freight for the big logistics names you'd recognize, hauling everything from auto parts to refrigerated produce across all 48 states. She was good at it. Really good. But somewhere between the eighty-hour weeks and the dispatch calls at 3 AM telling her the rate just got cut again, she started doing the math.

"If I'm going to drive myself into the ground, it's going to be for something that's mine."

So in 2025 she did it. She cashed in years of savings, financed a fleet of equipment that fits the gap most carriers ignore — 13' box trucks, pickups paired with 18' trailers, capability for 5th wheels, campers, bumper pulls — and pulled her MC authority. ID Hotshot Transportation hit the road out of Tucson with three trucks and a phone number that she answered herself.

Within months, demand was outpacing what Arizona alone could handle. She opened a second shop in Colorado to put trucks closer to the freight that was already calling. Today, ID Hotshot is small enough to know every customer's name and big enough to move just about anything you need to move — same day, fully insured, and almost always under what the bigger guys quote.

It's a single mom with twenty years of road behind her, a daughter heading off to college, and a fleet that doesn't say no.

Iliana D. · Founder
'05
CDL at 20. First long-haul gig running Phoenix to Long Beach.
'08
Daughter is born. Puts her on the road in a car seat at six months. Doesn't slow down.
'15
Owner-operator. Buys her first truck. Runs it for a decade.
'25
ID Hotshot is born. MC authority, fleet, Tucson HQ. Three trucks, one mission.
'26
Colorado shop opens. Expanded fleet. Same answered phone.
Equipment & Services

If it rolls, we move it. Period.

From a single pallet across town to a 5th wheel across four states — every piece of our fleet was bought to fill a gap. We don't turn down weird loads. That's kind of our thing.

13' Box Truck
Lift gate, ramp, tie-downs. Perfect for furniture, single pallets, partial loads, and last-mile delivery. Up to ~5,000 lb payload.
13' interior from $1.40/mi
Pickup + 18' Trailer
Our hotshot bread-and-butter. Open or enclosed 18' trailers behind 1-ton diesels. Equipment, machinery, building materials, vehicles.
18' deck from $1.55/mi
5th Wheel Hauling
Need a 5th wheel RV moved without putting miles on it yourself? We have the hitches and the experience. Cross-state or cross-country.
up to 40' from $1.85/mi
Camper / Travel Trailer
Bumper-pull and travel trailers moved with care. Pre-trip inspection, tire & bearing check, secure tow to anywhere in the lower 48.
up to 35' from $1.75/mi
Bumper Pull / Utility
Cars, ATVs, golf carts, side-by-sides, small equipment. If it fits on a bumper-pull trailer, we'll get it there.
16-20' from $1.65/mi
Expedited / Hot Shot
Time-critical freight. Construction parts, oilfield equipment, manufacturing downtime stoppers. We roll within hours.
4hr dispatch custom quote
